auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.description: Use the email and temporary password from your HR admin.
auth.login.requestPilotSuffix: if you'd rather we set it up for you.
auth.signup.title: Start your team
auth.signup.description: Spin up a new MENT organization. You'll be the first admin and can invite colleagues right after.
auth.signup.intraDescription: Single employer. Full peer profiles visible.
auth.signup.interDescription: Cross-company. Surnames, job titles and location hidden.
auth.signup.error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.signup.error.emailTaken: That email already has an account. Sign in instead.
auth.signup.error.genericWithCode: Could not create your team ({code}). Try again.
auth.signup.error.generic: Could not create your team. Try again.
auth.requestAccess.title: Request access
auth.requestAccess.description: Tell us who should own the pilot conversation on your side.
auth.requestAccess.successMessage: Request received. We will follow up by email.
auth.requestAccess.error.alreadyOpen: There is already an open request for that email.
auth.requestAccess.error.invalidEmail: Use a valid work email address.
auth.requestAccess.error.generic: Could not submit the request. Please try again.
auth.forcePassword.title: Set a new password
auth.forcePassword.description: Replace your temporary password to continue.
auth.forcePassword.error.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
